steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage asks for the area of the Yakama Nation in Washington. The table lists five tribal nations with their locations and areas. Find the row for the Yakama Nation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '10,864 square miles': This is the area of the Choctaw Nation in Oklahoma, not the Yakama Nation. ✗
  • Choice B — '2,533 square miles': This is the area of the Hopi Tribe in Arizona, not the Yakama Nation. ✗
  • Choice C — '4,453 square miles': This is the area of the Tohono O'odham Nation in Arizona, not the Yakama Nation. ✗
  • Choice D — '2,188 square miles': The Yakama Nation, Washington row shows exactly 2,188 square miles. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
